descriptiveGuide: Focus on maintaining a conversational pace throughout this 25-minute easy run. Keep your breathing relaxed and your stride short — if you can't hold a conversation, slow down. This builds your aerobic base without stressing your joints.
imagePrompts: Side-view instructional illustration of a runner at an easy conversational pace, showing relaxed posture: slight forward lean from ankles, short stride length, midfoot landing under hips. Include subtle arrows indicating compact arm swing at 90 degrees and relaxed shoulders. Minimal background, clean lines, annotated form cues with arrows (no text banners).

descriptiveGuide: This 20-minute interval session alternates between 1-minute faster efforts and 2-minute easy recovery jogs. Push during the fast intervals but not to a sprint — aim for a pace where you're breathing hard but in control. Walk if you need to recover.
imagePrompts: Instructional sequence illustration of interval running form: two side-by-side figures — one at faster effort with slightly longer stride and stronger arm drive, one at easy recovery jog with shorter stride and relaxed arms. Use arrows to show increased knee drive and arm swing in the faster phase. Clean minimal background, annotated form cues with arrows, no text banners.

descriptiveGuide: This 10-minute guided session focuses on body scan awareness. Sit comfortably with your back straight, close your eyes, and slowly move your attention from your toes to the top of your head. Notice sensations without judgment.

This 35-minute full-body session covers compound movements: 3 sets of squats, bench press, and bent-over rows. Start with a weight you can lift for 8-10 reps with good form. Rest 90 seconds between sets and focus on controlled movement.
imagePrompts: Instructional illustration of a barbell back squat at bottom position, showing neutral spine, knees tracking over toes, hips back and down to parallel. Include arrows highlighting chest up, weight through midfoot/heels, and knee alignment. Minimal gym background, clean anatomical style, annotated form cues with arrows, no text banners.

Instructional illustration of a flat bench press setup and bottom position: feet planted, slight arch in lower back, shoulder blades retracted, bar path vertically over mid-chest. Include arrows showing wrist stacked over elbows and controlled bar path. Minimal background, clean lines, annotated form cues with arrows, no text banners.

descriptiveGuide: A 15-minute core circuit: 30-second plank, 15 dead bugs per side, and 15 bird-dogs per side. Repeat 3 rounds with 30 seconds rest between exercises. Keep your lower back pressed into the floor during dead bugs.
imagePrompts: Instructional illustration of a forearm plank side view, showing straight line from head to heels, elbows under shoulders, core engaged. Include arrows indicating drawing ribs down and squeezing glutes to prevent hip sag. Minimal background, clean style, annotated form cues with arrows, no text banners.

Instructional illustration split into two panels: dead bug (supine, opposite arm and leg extended, lower back pressed into floor) and bird-dog (quadruped, opposite arm and leg extended, neutral spine). Use arrows to highlight limb extension and stable pelvis/spine. Minimal background, clean anatomical style, annotated form cues with arrows, no text banners.
